name: Manufacturing Process Framework
description: APQC Process Classification Framework adapted for manufacturing companies

processes.name: Develop Vision and Strategy
processes.description: Define business concept, organizational strategy, and strategic initiatives

processes.name: Develop and Manage Products and Services
processes.description: Design, prototype, and manage product lifecycle including new product development

processes.name: Market and Sell Products and Services
processes.description: Marketing strategy, lead generation, sales management, and customer acquisition

processes.name: Deliver Physical Products
processes.description: Plan and manage supply chain, production, warehousing, and logistics

processes.name: Manage Customer Service
processes.description: Handle customer inquiries, complaints, returns, and after-sales support

processes.name: Develop and Manage Human Capital
processes.description: Recruit, develop, retain employees and manage workforce planning

processes.name: Manage Information Technology
processes.description: IT strategy, infrastructure, applications, data management, and cybersecurity

processes.name: Manage Financial Resources
processes.description: Financial planning, accounting, treasury, tax, and internal audit

processes.name: Acquire, Construct, and Manage Assets
processes.description: Capital planning, facility management, and equipment maintenance

processes.name: Manage Enterprise Risk and Compliance
processes.description: Risk management, regulatory compliance, quality management, and EHS

processes.name: Manage External Relationships
processes.description: Government relations, community engagement, and stakeholder management

processes.name: Develop and Manage Business Capabilities
processes.description: Process improvement, change management, and organizational knowledge

name: Financial Services Process Framework
description: APQC Process Classification Framework adapted for banks and financial institutions

processes.name: Develop Vision and Strategy
processes.description: Define strategic direction, business model, and competitive positioning

processes.name: Develop and Manage Financial Products
processes.description: Design, price, and manage financial products (loans, deposits, investments)

processes.name: Market and Sell Financial Services
processes.description: Marketing, customer acquisition, relationship management, and cross-selling

processes.name: Process Financial Transactions
processes.description: Transaction processing, payment clearing, settlement, and reconciliation

processes.name: Manage Risk and Compliance
processes.description: Credit risk, market risk, operational risk, AML/KYC, and regulatory compliance

processes.name: Manage Customer Service
processes.description: Account servicing, dispute resolution, claims processing, and customer support

processes.name: Manage Credit and Lending
processes.description: Credit assessment, loan origination, underwriting, and collections

processes.name: Develop and Manage Human Capital
processes.description: Talent management, training, compensation, and workforce planning

processes.name: Manage Information Technology
processes.description: Core banking systems, digital channels, cybersecurity, and data management

processes.name: Manage Financial Resources
processes.description: Treasury, capital management, financial reporting, and audit

name: Healthcare Process Framework
description: APQC Process Classification Framework adapted for healthcare organizations

processes.name: Develop Vision and Strategy
processes.description: Healthcare strategy, service line planning, and quality improvement initiatives

processes.name: Manage Patient Access
processes.description: Scheduling, registration, insurance verification, and patient intake

processes.name: Provide Clinical Care
processes.description: Diagnosis, treatment, care coordination, and clinical documentation

processes.name: Manage Pharmacy and Medications
processes.description: Medication management, dispensing, formulary management, and drug safety

processes.name: Manage Revenue Cycle
processes.description: Charge capture, coding, billing, collections, and payer management

processes.name: Manage Quality and Patient Safety
processes.description: Clinical quality measures, patient safety programs, and accreditation

processes.name: Manage Supply Chain
processes.description: Procurement, inventory, equipment management, and vendor relations

processes.name: Develop and Manage Human Capital
processes.description: Credentialing, staffing, training, and workforce management

processes.name: Manage Health Information Technology
processes.description: EHR management, health data exchange, telehealth, and cybersecurity

processes.name: Manage Compliance and Risk
processes.description: HIPAA compliance, clinical risk, regulatory reporting, and legal affairs

name: Retail Process Framework
description: APQC Process Classification Framework adapted for retail companies

processes.name: Develop Vision and Strategy
processes.description: Retail strategy, format planning, and market positioning

processes.name: Manage Merchandising
processes.description: Category management, assortment planning, pricing, and promotions

processes.name: Manage Supply Chain and Logistics
processes.description: Sourcing, procurement, distribution, inventory management, and fulfillment

processes.name: Market and Sell Products
processes.description: Marketing, omnichannel sales, loyalty programs, and customer engagement

processes.name: Manage Store Operations
processes.description: Store staffing, visual merchandising, POS operations, and loss prevention

processes.name: Manage E-commerce Operations
processes.description: Online storefront, digital marketing, order fulfillment, and returns

processes.name: Manage Customer Experience
processes.description: Customer service, returns, complaints, and satisfaction measurement

processes.name: Develop and Manage Human Capital
processes.description: Store staffing, training, labor scheduling, and employee engagement

processes.name: Manage Information Technology
processes.description: POS systems, e-commerce platform, analytics, and data management

processes.name: Manage Financial Resources
processes.description: Financial planning, accounting, loss prevention analytics, and reporting

name: Technology Company Process Framework
description: APQC Process Classification Framework adapted for technology and SaaS companies

processes.name: Develop Vision and Strategy
processes.description: Product vision, technology roadmap, and go-to-market strategy

processes.name: Develop Products and Technology
processes.description: Product management, engineering, architecture, QA, and release management

processes.name: Market and Sell Solutions
processes.description: Marketing, demand generation, sales, partnerships, and customer acquisition

processes.name: Deliver and Support Services
processes.description: Implementation, onboarding, technical support, and customer success

processes.name: Manage Platform Operations
processes.description: Infrastructure, DevOps, monitoring, incident response, and SLA management

processes.name: Manage Customer Lifecycle
processes.description: Onboarding, adoption, expansion, renewal, and churn prevention

processes.name: Develop and Manage Human Capital
processes.description: Engineering hiring, culture, professional development, and retention

processes.name: Manage Information Security
processes.description: Security architecture, compliance (SOC2, ISO), data privacy, and incident response

processes.name: Manage Financial Resources
processes.description: Revenue recognition, SaaS metrics, budgeting, and investor relations

processes.name: Manage Enterprise Risk
processes.description: IP protection, vendor risk, regulatory compliance, and business continuity
